title: Junior Business Development Manager at JLL India

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at JLL India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Business Development Manager looking for your next big career move? JLL India in Chandigarh offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About JLL India:
JLL India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Market Research

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with JLL India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
